blended.narrative: Smugglers Notch is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 236 ft. Looking ahead, 16 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 24°F. Expect powder.
